Today’s deal at Woot delivers a massive 88% discount on that price to shave a whopping $179 off its usual going rate. items.title: Official Target x Pokémon 30th anniversary gear collection goes live online today from $3.50
items.summary:
Update: 5/4: The online sale for the new Target x Pokémon 30th anniversary Pokémon gear is now live.

Back in mid April Target announced a giant official collaboration with Pokémon, and the exclusive new collection goes live today ay 9 a.m. ET right here. This limited-time collection is designed to “celebrate 30 years of the iconic brand” with over 100 exclusive items set to go up for sale online starting today.

items.title: Grab a current-gen set of Beats Solo Buds for just over $40 today
items.summary:
Beats Solo Buds Wireless Bluetooth Earbuds (Refurb)

Buy for $42 (Reg. $70+)

Free shipping for Prime members, $6 fee otherwise.

What we love

They are refurbished, but you are getting a 1-year warranty here and a set of current-gen Beats buds for a touch over $40 today. The charging case does not have a battery, but with 18 hours of juice in the buds themselves, most folks will be entirely covered here and at nearly 50% off the list price.

items.title: Best Apple Mother’s Day deals: AirPods, Apple Watch Series 11 all-time lows, MacBooks $300 off, iPads, more
items.summary:
The first weekend in May has arrived and with it we are tracking a host of big-time deals on Apple gear ahead of Mother’s Day. Joining price drops on AirPods Pro 3 and AirPods 4 at $99, we are also tracking new all-time low pricing on several Apple Watch Series 11 models with deals starting from $299 and as much as $160 slashed from the list prices. The new 2026 MacBook deals are in full force as well, with deep discounts across both the MacBook Air and Pro lineups (as much as $300 off), as well as M4 iPad Air deals and some seriously notable M3 iPad clearance deals at up to $300 off. All of that alongside some accessory offers are organized for you down below.
